mapper.sql:
WHERE c.branch_seq = #{branchSeq} AND c.deleted = 0 AND (ts.deleted = 0 OR ts.deleted IS NULL)
AND c.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
mapper.select:
SELECT c.seq, c.name, c.description, c.capacity, c.sort_order AS sortOrder, c.time_slot_seq AS timeSlotSeq, ts.name AS timeSlotName, c.staff_seq AS staffSeq, s.name AS staffName, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM complex_member_class_mapping mcm WHERE mcm.class_seq = c.seq) AS memberCount, c.created_date AS createdDate FROM complex_classes c LEFT JOIN class_time_slots ts ON c.time_slot_seq = ts.seq LEFT JOIN complex_members s ON c.staff_seq = s.seq
ORDER BY c.sort_order ASC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM complex_classes c LEFT JOIN class_time_slots ts ON c.time_slot_seq = ts.seq
